story: On a human-interest assignment, a reporter saw neighbors Daniel and Marjorie share a fond pat and set up tea to learn their secret. Over shortbread, Marjorie said love comes in tides. A thump cut the TV; they found Daniel, red-faced, wrestling the set and stand. He’d been queuing an old anniversary video as a surprise for Marjorie. He snapped, “I wasn’t trying to do anything—caught my foot on the cord. Go eat your cookies.” I hovered in the doorway.
implausible_knowledge: He’d been queuing an old anniversary video as a surprise for Marjorie.
question: After Daniel’s outburst in the bedroom, what is the reporter most likely to do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Cheerfully invent an excuse to draw Marjorie to the kitchen, giving Daniel privacy to finish setting up his surprise.
answer_without_knowledge: Follow Marjorie back to the living room.
